title: Provider Sweep
description: Validate your local/hosted provider lanes and establish an initial connection baseline.

title: Save Vault Secret
description: Store one secret in Vault+ to validate encrypted local credential handling.

title: Run 90s Proof
description: Execute /proof to demonstrate trust posture and value flow in the current runtime.

title: Share Proof Badge
description: Copy the proof badge/summary link to verify outbound sharing UX.
